$comment: AI4Comms fixed cross-deliverable strings. AI4Comms is a brand of Duke Strategy & Corporate Affairs B.V.; company facts live in profile.json, not here. The rendered copyright is deliberately brand-facing (AI4Comms), NOT the legal entity — client-facing deliverables carry the brand the client engaged, not the parent B.V. The trademark field keeps the accurate brand-of relationship for formal documents. This removes the leak that build_payloads.py used to strip by hand (Emma review, r2/r4 A8).

legal.trademark: AI4Comms is een merk van Duke Strategy & Corporate Affairs B.V.
